mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( buyer_id, machinery_id, owner_id, address_id, rent_days, lease_start_time, lease_end_time, total_amount, deposit_amount, remark, status, tracking_no, create_time ) VALUES ( #{buyerId}, #{machineryId}, #{ownerId}, #{addressId}, #{rentDays}, #{leaseStartTime}, #{leaseEndTime}, #{totalAmount}, #{depositAmount}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{trackingNo}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE tracking_no = #{trackingNo}
